name: Shellfish Stew Alla Tarantina
recipeIngredient: 1 lb large shrimp, U-15 size, peeled and deveined
1 lb calamari, cleaned of skin, ink sac and beak
1 lb small clams or cockles, scrubbed and drained
1 medium red onion, chopped into 1/4-inch dice
1 red bell pepper, seeded and cored, chopped into 1/4-inch pieces
1 yellow bell pepper, seeded and cored, chopped into 1/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut calamari into 1/2-inch rings and check oysters for sand and bits of shell.
2. In a 4 quart pot, heat olive oil until smoking.
3. Add onion, peppers, and thyme leaves and cook until softened but not brown, about 10 minutes.
4. Add wine and tomato sauce and bring to a boil.
5. Add clams, shrimp, and mussels and cover.
6. Cook 3 to 4 minutes until clams have all opened.
7. Add calamari and cook 2 minutes until opaque.
8. Season with salt and pepper, add oysters and oyster liquid and simmer 2 to 3 minutes until oysters have tightened around outer edges.
9. Divide shellfish over pieces of bread in 4 bowls, pour in broth and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
